albums.title: Annual Day Celebration 2025
albums.description: A night of music, dance, and quiet pride. Students from LKG to Class 12 performed before a packed auditorium of parents, teachers, and community members.

albums.title: Annual Sports Meet 2025
albums.description: Inter-house athletics and team sports. House colours were on full display as students competed in track events, kho-kho, kabaddi, and relay races.

albums.title: Inter-House Science Exhibition
albums.description: Working models and scientific investigations by students from Classes 6 to 12. Judged by external examiners from nearby colleges.

albums.title: Republic Day 2026
albums.description: Flag hoisting and cultural performances marking India's 77th Republic Day.

albums.title: Independence Day 2025
albums.description: Celebrations marking India's 78th Independence Day with cultural performances and a special address.

albums.title: Senior Secondary Educational Tour
albums.description: Class 11 and 12 students visited the Birla Planetarium and Science Centre, New Delhi, as part of the annual educational tour.

albums.title: Inter-House Cultural Competition
albums.description: Debate, quiz, and creative arts competition between the four houses.

albums.title: Classroom Activities — Primary
albums.description: Hands-on learning across subjects in the primary wing — science experiments, mathematics manipulatives, and language games.

albums.title: Student Council Investiture 2025
albums.description: The new student council was sworn in at a formal investiture ceremony on 18 April 2025.
